name: Popcorn Cake for Christmas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, combine marshmallows and butter. Mix over low flame, stirring until smooth.
2. In a large bowl, mix together popcorn, gumdrops, salted nuts, and popcorn.
3. Pour the marshmallow mixture evenly over the popcorn mixture.
4. Transfer everything into a greased and powdered sugar-dusted angel food cake pan.
5. Pack down tightly so that all ingredients are well incorporated.
6. Remove from the pan once it is no longer sticky and slice.
